message:
fix(serve): remove redundant session filtering in WS attention delivery

The session filter was being checked twice in deliverAttentionEvent and
deliverAttentionReplay - once explicitly, then again inside
matchesAttentionFilters. Pass empty string to skip the duplicate check.

[bd-j9jo3.8.3]

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
